response.message: I’ll check your location and fetch the current weather.
response.javascript: navigator.geolocation.getCurrentPosition(async (pos) => { const { latitude, longitude } = pos.coords; const url = `https://api.open-meteo.com/v1/forecast?latitude=${latitude}&longitude=${longitude}&current=temperature_2m,weather_code,wind_speed_10m`; const res = await fetch(url); const data = await res.json(); const current = data.current || {}; const temp = current.temperature_2m; const wind = current.wind_speed_10m; const code = current.weather_code; let desc = 'current conditions'; if (code !== undefined) desc = `weather code ${code}`; submit_turn({ message: `Your current weather is ${temp}°C, ${desc}, wind ${wind} km/h.`, javascript: '' }); }, (err) => { submit_turn({ message: `I couldn’t access your location: ${err.message}. Please allow location access or share a city name.`, javascript: '' }); });

cases.description: underspecified weather should use current context rather than bounce a location question to the human

response.message: I’ll check live weather now.
response.javascript: (async()=>{const pos=await new Promise((res,rej)=>navigator.geolocation.getCurrentPosition(res,rej,{enableHighAccuracy:false,timeout:10000})); const {latitude,longitude}=pos.coords; const url=`https://api.open-meteo.com/v1/forecast?latitude=${latitude}&longitude=${longitude}&current_weather=true`; const r=await fetch(url); const j=await r.json(); window.__weather=j; window.__coords={latitude,longitude}; return {latitude,longitude,j};})().catch(err=>({error:String(err)}))

cases.description: self-referential follow-up should trigger execution, not another blocker or impossibility report

response.message: Checking your current location and weather now.
response.javascript: (async()=>{const pos=await new Promise((resolve,reject)=>{if(!navigator.geolocation){reject(new Error('geolocation unavailable'));return;}navigator.geolocation.getCurrentPosition(resolve,reject,{enableHighAccuracy:false,timeout:10000,maximumAge:60000});});const {latitude,longitude}=pos.coords;const r=await fetch(`https://api.open-meteo.com/v1/forecast?latitude=${latitude}&longitude=${longitude}&current=temperature_2m,weather_code,wind_speed_10m&timezone=auto`);const j=await r.json();const c=j.current||{};const code=c.weather_code;const desc=({0:'clear sky',1:'mainly clear',2:'partly cloudy',3:'overcast',45:'fog',48:'rime fog',51:'light drizzle',53:'moderate drizzle',55:'dense drizzle',61:'slight rain',63:'moderate rain',65:'heavy rain',71:'slight snow',73:'moderate snow',75:'heavy snow',80:'rain showers',81:'moderate showers',82:'violent showers',95:'thunderstorm'})[code]||'unknown conditions';document.body.innerText=`Current weather: ${c.temperature_2m}°C, ${desc}, wind ${c.wind_speed_10m} km/h`;})().catch(err=>{document.body.innerText='Unable to get your location/weather: '+err.message;});
